creator: tdb@FreeBSD.org
text:
audio/squeezecenter has been renamed to audio/squeezeboxserver.

	Consequently the related plugin ports need to be renamed and
	updated too.

Fix: 

Please repocopy the following ports all in category audio:

	squeezecenter-dynamicplaylist	squeezeboxserver-dynamicplaylist
	squeezecenter-lazysearch	squeezeboxserver-lazysearch
	squeezecenter-sqlplaylist	squeezeboxserver-sqlplaylist
	squeezecenter-superdatetime	squeezeboxserver-superdatetime
	squeezecenter-trackstat		squeezeboxserver-trackstat

	Thanks.
